---
title: "Edwin Nobbs"
---

## Edwin Nobbs

**Dates:** (d.1864)

### Description

Melanesian missionary

### Biography

He was the son of the Rev. George Nobbs, who ministered to the Pitcairn community at Norfolk Island.  He was killed with arrows on the island of Santa Cruz along with Fisher Young.

### Letters

- Letter from [‘Southern Cross’ between Auckland and Norfolk Island, May 1864]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
